message:
Fix broken links in index and tutorial pages

- index.mdx: Use absolute paths with trailing slashes for quickstart link
- index.mdx: Point "Learn TQL" to /explanations/language/ (pipeline page doesn't exist)
- plot-data-with-charts: Fix run-pipelines path from /guides/usage/basics/ to /guides/basic-usage/

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,15 +35,15 @@ The Tenzir documentation consists of four different types of materials:
 <Card title="Ready to dive in?" icon="pencil">
 Get your fingers dirty and explore the demo node with just a few clicks and
 a guided tour. Security data has never been easier.
-<LinkButton href="guides/quickstart">
+<LinkButton href="/guides/quickstart/">
 Quickstart
 </LinkButton>
 </Card>
 
 <Card title="New to Tenzir?" icon="document">
 Learn the basics of pipelines and get familiar with the Tenzir Query
 Language (TQL). You'll master security data in no time.
-<LinkButton href="explanations/architecture/pipeline">
+<LinkButton href="/explanations/language/">
 Learn TQL
 </LinkButton>
 </Card>

@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ Plotting data in the Explorer involves three steps:
 
 <Steps>
 
-1. [Run a pipeline](/guides/usage/basics/run-pipelines) to prepare the
+1. [Run a pipeline](/guides/basic-usage/run-pipelines/) to prepare the
    data.
 2. Add a `chart_*` operator to render the plot.
 3. View the chart below the Editor.
